Interface FaweCompoundTag

public sealed interface FaweCompoundTag
A wrapper around compound tags, potentially lazily transformed.
Since:
2.11.2

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    org.enginehub.linbus.tree.LinCompoundTag
    linTag()
    Returns the underlying tag.
    static FaweCompoundTag
    of(com.google.common.base.Supplier<? extends org.enginehub.linbus.tree.LinCompoundTag> supplier)
    Returns a lazy compound component backed by a supplier.
    static FaweCompoundTag
    of(LazyReference<? extends org.enginehub.linbus.tree.LinCompoundTag> lazyReference)
    Returns a lazy compound component backed by a lazy reference.
    static FaweCompoundTag
    of(org.enginehub.linbus.tree.LinCompoundTag linCompoundTag)
    Returns a direct reference tho the given compound tag.

  • Method Details

    • of

      static FaweCompoundTag of(LazyReference<? extends org.enginehub.linbus.tree.LinCompoundTag> lazyReference)
      Returns a lazy compound component backed by a lazy reference.
      Parameters:
      lazyReference - the lazy reference to the actual compound tag
      Returns:
      a lazy compound component backed by a lazy reference

    • of

      static FaweCompoundTag of(com.google.common.base.Supplier<? extends org.enginehub.linbus.tree.LinCompoundTag> supplier)
      Returns a lazy compound component backed by a supplier. Invocations to the supplier are memoized.
      Parameters:
      supplier - the supplier for the actual compound tag
      Returns:
      a lazy compound component backed by a supplier

    • of

      static FaweCompoundTag of(org.enginehub.linbus.tree.LinCompoundTag linCompoundTag)
      Returns a direct reference tho the given compound tag.
      Parameters:
      linCompoundTag - the tag to wrap
      Returns:
      a direct reference tho the given compound tag

    • linTag

      org.enginehub.linbus.tree.LinCompoundTag linTag()
      Returns the underlying tag.
      Returns:
      the underlying tag
